data.title: Russia Sent $5,000,000,000 Through JPMorgan and Citigroup in Alleged Scheme To Evade Sanctions: Report
data.description:
Russia reportedly sent a whopping $5 billion through banking giants JPMorgan Chase and Citigroup in a scheme to skirt US sanctions. According to a report from the Wall Street Journal citing “people familiar with the matter,” investigators at the Justice Department (DOJ) believe Russia used a state-controlled bank to move billions of dollars through correspondent […]
The post Russia Sent...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/15/russia-sent-5000000000-through-jpmorgan-and-citigroup-in-alleged-scheme-to-evade-sanctions-report/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 670 USDT with a 0.96% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 15, 2025, 16:24 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 670 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 670.210022 USDT, with a narrowed 0.96% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Blockchain.com appoints former Goldman Sachs exec Justin Evans as CFO as it prepares for IPO
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Blockchain.com appointed former Goldman Sachs crypto investment bank head Justin Evans as chief financial officer and former Point72 Asset Management investment manager Mike Wilcox as chief operating officer. Mike Wilcox once served as Velocity Global’s chief financial officer. The appointment is to further promote the IPO plan. Justin Evans said the company is taking necessary measures to prepare for the listing. 
It is reported that many cryptocurrency companies are considering listing, including Circle, Kraken, Bullish Global (CoinDesk’s parent company), Gemini, Ripple and BitGo. (Coindesk)

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees $184 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
data.description: According to PANews, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market experienced liquidations totaling $184 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $102 million, while short positions saw liquidations of $82.19 million. Bitcoin (BTC) faced liquidations amounting to $25.01 million, and Ethereum (ETH) saw liquidations totaling $26.65 million.

data.title: TikTok Returns to U.S. App Stores After Temporary Removal
data.description: According to Odaily, the short video social media platform TikTok confirmed on the 14th that its application has been restored on the Apple and Google app stores in the United States. The app became available again starting from the evening of the 13th. Reports indicate that TikTok is now functioning normally on both platforms.

data.title: Strike Emerges As Top Performer In Initial Trading Weeks
data.description: According to PANews, MicroStrategy founder Michael Saylor announced on the X platform that $STRK has been one of the best-performing perpetual preferred stocks in its first two weeks of trading. Previously, it was reported that Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy, has listed its convertible preferred stock, Strike (STRK), on Nasdaq.
